description_long: This is a modern office swivel chair with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring a high, slightly curved backrest and a contoured seat, both upholstered in a dark, likely synthetic material. The chair is supported by a central metal column that branches out into a five-pointed star base, each point ending in a caster wheel for mobility. The armrests are straight, parallel to the seat, and appear to be made of metal with matching dark padding or coating. Visible adjustment levers are located beneath the seat, suggesting height and possibly tilt adjustment functionality. The overall construction combines metal and synthetic materials, giving the chair a professional and durable appearance. Its design is ergonomic, suitable for extended use in office or urban work environments.
description: A sleek, modern swivel chair with a high backrest, straight armrests, and a five-caster star base, finished in dark materials and metal. Ergonomic and adjustable, it is ideal for office or urban workspace settings.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the high backrest, straight armrests, and the five-caster star base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's slim profile, armrest, and visible adjustment lever beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide seat, high backrest, and both armrests symmetrically.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and adjustment lever beneath the seat.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical metal column with a telescoping mechanism, supporting the seat and connecting to a five-pointed star base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and slightly curved backrest with horizontal stitching or ribbing, upholstered in dark synthetic material.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, parallel armrests made of metal with dark padding or coating, attached to both the seat and backrest.
